data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Quantum investors who suffered losses between Nov 15, 2024 and Aug 18, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: Investors who faced losses in Quantum Corporation from November 15, 2024, to August 18, 2025, are urged to reach out to James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP. He is advocating for affected investors to discuss their options directly. If you experienced losses in the mentioned period, it is advised to contact him promptly for further guidance.

data.title: Velan Inc. reports Q2 results: $67.6M sales, $15.7M profit, $1.7M loss. Backlog at $285.8M, bookings $65.2M. For fiscal 2026.
data.description: Velan Inc., a manufacturer of industrial valves, reported financial results for Q2 2025 with sales at $67.6 million (down from $77.7 million) and net loss at $1.7 million (compared to $1.2 million loss last year). The company's backlog increased to $285.8 million, with bookings at $65.2 million for the quarter. Adjusted EBITDA was $3.4 million, down from $6.7 million last year. For the six-month period, sales were $139.8 million (up from $138.6 million), and net income was $16.2 million (compared to a $3.4 million loss last year). The company has a strong financial position with $29.5 million in cash and total liquidity of approximately $96 million. Velan remains optimistic about its growth prospects in fiscal 2026. The company also declared a dividend of CA$0.10 per common share.

data.title: Teck to announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 22, 2025 for TECK.A and TECK.B on TSX/NYSE. Market open.
data.description: Teck Resources Limited, a company listed on TSX as TECK.A and TECK.B, and on NYSE as TECK, is scheduled to announce its Q3 2025 financial performance data on October 22, 2025, ahead of market opening in Vancouver, British Columbia. The details will be shared worldwide via Globe Newswire.

data.title: Alkane Resources produced 36,407 ounces of gold equivalent, with A$191 million in assets, A$45 million debt repaid.
data.description: Alkane Resources Ltd (ASX:ALK, TSX:ALK, OTC:ALKEF) from Perth, Australia, announced that they produced 36,407 ounces of gold equivalent between July 1, 2025, and September 30, 2025. The production was affected by the slower production at Björkdal during the Swedish extended summer vacation period. The company's holdings at the end of the quarter included cash ($160 million), bullion ($14 million), and listed investments ($17 million), totaling A$191 million. During this period, they repaid A$45 million of debt, incurred one-off transaction costs of A$25 million due to the merger with Mandalay, and filled hedging of 7,250 ounces of gold. Additional information will be provided in the full September 2025 Quarterly Report later this month.

data.title: Investors of KBR between May 6 to June 19, 2025 with losses urged to contact James Wilson for legal options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who faced losses in KBR to reach out to him for a consultation on their available options. The specified timeframe for losses in KBR is from May 6, 2025, to June 19, 2025. Investors seeking to understand their legal rights and potential courses of action can contact James Wilson directly by calling the provided number.
